chomageIa.actionNeedsEndpoint: This action requires a dedicated endpoint.
chomageIa.actionNeedsSchema: This action requires a schema update.
chomageIa.citedSourcesDesc: Knowledge base sources referenced by the AI in this conversation.
chomageIa.citedSourcesEmpty: Sources cited by the AI in this conversation will appear here.
chomageIa.citationNotFound: Cited source not found in the KB sent
chomageIa.noExternalUrl: No external URL — internal KB source.
chomageIa.missingSourcesTitle: The AI mentions sources that are not in the KB
chomageIa.missingSourcesHint: Once the source has been added, re-ask the question for a sourced answer.
chomageIa.voiceNoSpeechDesc: Try again, speaking louder and for longer.
chomageIa.micUnsupported: Microphone not supported by this browser
chomageIa.modelAriaLabel: Choose the Claude model for this session
chomageIa.scopeTriggerTitle: Scope AI search to specific KB folders
chomageIa.scopeKbDesc: Limits AI search to specific folders. Empty = entire KB. Subfolders are automatically included.
chomageIa.promptCopied: Prompt copied — paste it into Claude Code
chomageIa.copyPromptTitle: Copy the prompt to the clipboard
chomageIa.emptyDescPart1: The AI will cite KB sources with clickable
chomageIa.emptyDescPart3: button to generate a Claude Code prompt to paste.
chomageIa.openSourcesHint: Open the “Cited sources” drawer from the header.
chomageIa.promoteSourceTitle: Convert this answer into a permanent KB source
chomageIa.regenAbortedTitle: Relaunch Claude from the same question (partial content will be replaced)
chomageIa.streamingTitle: Response being generated via Claude streaming
chomageIa.editAndRegenTitle: Edit this message and regenerate the rest
chomageIa.deleteUserMessageDesc: This user message will be permanently deleted from the conversation.
chomageIa.deleteAiMessageDesc: This AI response will be permanently deleted. Cited sources remain in the KB.
chomageIa.messageNotPersisted: Message not persisted, deletion not possible.
chomageIa.resendTitle: Resend the edited message and regenerate the rest
chomageIa.pendingStep3: Long answer in progress, just a moment…
chomageIa.pendingStep4: Still in progress — the request may take 1–2 min.
chomageIa.chatPlaceholder: Ask a question about unemployment — the AI will reply citing KB sources…
chomageIa.uploadSourceAria: Upload a file to the KB
chomageIa.webSearchOnTitle: Web search ENABLED for this message (click to disable)
chomageIa.webSearchOffTitle: Allow web search for this message (3 results max)
chomageIa.webSearchAria: Allow web search for this message
chomageIa.enterToSend: Enter to send · Shift+Enter for new line
chomageIa.templateOverwriteConfirm: Overwrite the current brief and technical context with this template?
chomageIa.briefPlaceholder: E.g.: Create an AGR calculator for involuntary part-time workers…
chomageIa.techContextPlaceholder: E.g.: Reuse the Pension pattern (2-col layout, jspdf, CountryFlag)…
chomageIa.noConversations: No conversations — start by asking a question in the chat.
chomageIa.renameConversationDesc: The new title will appear in the rail and history.
chomageIa.renameConversationPlaceholder: E.g.: Mutual termination and notice period…
chomageIa.deleteConversationDesc: “{title}” will be permanently deleted ({count, plural, one {# message} other {# messages}}).
chomageIa.retryOrCheckConsole: Retry or check the server console.
chomageIa.promptGeneratedSavedToast: Prompt generated and saved to history
chomageIa.editNoSession: Unable to edit: no active session
chomageIa.editMustBeUserMessage: The message to edit must be a user message
chomageIa.noUserMessageUpstream: No user message upstream to regenerate
chomageIa.activeSourcesCount: {count, plural, one {# active source} other {# active sources}}
chomageIa.viewCitedSourcesTitle: View sources cited in this conversation
chomageIa.aiDisabledBanner: AI is disabled — sending messages and generation are unavailable.
chomageIa.paletteEmpty: No snippets yet. Create one to insert it quickly.
chomageIa.qaDialogTitle: Validate this answer as a KB source
chomageIa.qaDialogDesc: The Q&A will be added to the knowledge base with kind “Validated Q&A”, indexed for semantic search and automatically tagged.
chomageIa.qaNotesPlaceholder: Details, verified external sources, validity dates…
chomageIa.promptsHistoryDescPart1: Claude Code prompts generated via the
chomageIa.promptsHistoryDescPart2: mode in the chat bar. Click to re-display in the current conversation.
chomageIa.promptsEmptyPart1: No prompts generated yet. Use the
chomageIa.promptsEmptyPart2: button in the chat bar to start your first brief.
chomageIa.deletePromptDesc: “{title}” will be permanently deleted from history.
chomageIa.invalidShortcutDesc: Letters, numbers, hyphens and underscores only
chomageIa.snippetsDescPart1: Frequently used phrases and templates insertable via
chomageIa.snippetsDescPart2: in the chat or brief text area.
chomageIa.snippetContentPlaceholder: The text that will be inserted in the text area when you type /shortcut…
chomageIa.snippetsEmptyPart1: No snippets yet. Create your first one to insert it via
chomageIa.attachPageOnTitle: Current page ATTACHED to the next message (click to cancel)
chomageIa.attachPageOffTitle: Attach the URL + an excerpt of the current page to the next message
chomageIa.miniEmptyTitle: Ask a question about Belgian unemployment
chomageIa.miniEmptyDesc: Sourced answers from the KB. The thread resets on close (disposable mini-chat).
chomageIa.aiDisabledBody: The chat and prompt generator will be unable to respond because {reason}. Source management remains available.
chomageIa.aiDisabledReasonKey: the ANTHROPIC_API_KEY environment variable is not configured
chomageIa.promptsGenerated: {count, plural, one {# prompt generated} other {# prompts generated}}
chomageIa.gapDetected: Detected {when} · {count, plural, one {# time} other {# times}}
chomageIa.searchInMoniteur: Search in the Belgian Official Gazette
chomageIa.memoryEmpty: No permanent facts. Add vocabulary (“ONEM = …”), style rules, or recurring preferences.
chomageIa.deleteFactDescription: This fact will no longer be injected into AI conversations. This action is permanent.
chomageIa.memoryFormDescription: Will be injected at the start of all unemployment AI conversations. Keep it concise (1–3 sentences) to conserve the token budget.
chomageIa.memoryContentPlaceholder: E.g. "ONEM = National Employment Office (Belgian unemployment authority)"
chomageIa.checkOk: Check OK · {created, plural, one {# new} other {# new}} · {skipped, plural, one {# already known} other {# already known}}
chomageIa.docValidated: Document validated and added to the KB
chomageIa.deleteWatchSourceDescription: The source will no longer be polled. IngestedDocument entries already detected remain in the queue.
chomageIa.watchSourceFormDescription: URL of an RSS feed or HTML page to scan periodically.
chomageIa.watchSourceUrlHint: Only ONEM, FPS, Belgian Official Gazette or other public sources.
chomageIa.watchSourcesEmpty: No sources. Add for example “https://www.onem.be” or an RSS feed from the Belgian Official Gazette.
chomageIa.queueEmpty: Queue empty. Run a check to scan the sources.
chomageIa.kind: {kind, select, text {Text} url {URL} tutorial {Tutorial} video_transcript {Video transcript} image_caption {Image} pdf {PDF} docx {Word} xlsx {Excel} pptx {PowerPoint} qa {Validated Q&A} other {{kind}}}
chomageIa.uploadKind: {kind, select, pdf {PDF} docx {Word} xlsx {Excel} pptx {PowerPoint} image_caption {Image} other {{kind}}}
chomageIa.acceptedFormats: Accepted: PDF, Word, Excel, PowerPoint, images.
chomageIa.singleFileHint: One file at a time here — use the Sources page for a batch.
chomageIa.duplicateConfirm:
This source already exists: “{title}”.

Upload again anyway?
chomageIa.quickUploadTitle: Add a source to the KB
chomageIa.quickUploadDescription: Drop a file (PDF, Word, Excel, PowerPoint, image). Text is extracted automatically. For a batch or tags, go to the Sources page.
chomageIa.chooseOrDropFile: Choose a file or drag and drop
chomageIa.dropOrBrowseSingle: Drop a file or click to browse
chomageIa.formatsLineSingle: PDF · Word · Excel · PowerPoint · Image — max 20 MB
chomageIa.titleEmptyPlaceholder: Empty → file name will be used
chomageIa.uploadDialogDescription: Drop multiple files at once. Formats: PDF, Word (.docx), Excel (.xlsx), PowerPoint (.pptx), images. Text is extracted automatically where possible. Max 20 MB per file.
chomageIa.dropOrBrowseMulti: Drop your files here or click to browse
chomageIa.formatsLineMulti: PDF · Word · Excel · PowerPoint · Images — multi-file
chomageIa.imageCaptionPlaceholder: Leave empty → automatic Tesseract OCR (fr+nl+en). Otherwise describe what the image shows.
chomageIa.filesUploaded: {count, plural, one {# file uploaded} other {# files uploaded}}
chomageIa.uploadDuplicatesHint: Check the duplicates and click “Re-upload” if you want to add them anyway.
chomageIa.uploadErrorsHint: Files with errors remain in the list — fix and retry.
chomageIa.sourceCreateDescription: Add content (text, URL, tutorial, transcript) to feed the unemployment AI.
chomageIa.sourceEditDescription: Edit content, tags, or temporarily disable.
chomageIa.sourceTitlePlaceholder: E.g.: Royal Decree of 25/11/1991 — art. 110: eligibility conditions
chomageIa.pdfImageUploadHint: PDF / image: use the “Upload” button on the page.
chomageIa.typeLockedHint: Type: {type} (can only be changed by re-uploading).
chomageIa.contentPlaceholder: Plain text, markdown or structured steps. The AI will read this content in its entirety.
chomageIa.summaryPlaceholder: One or two sentences. Leave empty to generate via AI.
chomageIa.tagApplyAddTo: {count, plural, one {Add to # source} other {Add to # sources}}
chomageIa.tagApplyRemoveFrom: {count, plural, one {Remove from # source} other {Remove from # sources}}
chomageIa.bulkDeleteDescription: {count, plural, one {# source will be permanently deleted from the knowledge base.} other {# sources will be permanently deleted from the knowledge base.}} Conversations that cited them will keep the references (but the pills will be greyed out).
chomageIa.noTagsYet: No tags in the KB yet.
chomageIa.noSourcesYetHint: Create your first source (text, URL, tutorial, transcript, PDF, image) to populate the knowledge base.
chomageIa.dragToMoveFolder: Drag to move to a folder
chomageIa.validityLabel: {status, select, fresh {Fresh} stale {Needs review} obsolete {Outdated} other {Not scanned}}
chomageIa.indexNone: Not yet indexed (chat uses full fallback)
chomageIa.sourcesMoved: {count, plural, one {# source moved} other {# sources moved}}
chomageIa.indexOkChunks: Indexing OK · {count, plural, one {# chunk (re)embedded} other {# chunks (re)embedded}}
chomageIa.bulkActionWithFailures: {verb} with {failed, plural, one {# failure} other {# failures}}
chomageIa.deleteSourceDescription: The source will be permanently deleted from the knowledge base.
chomageIa.bulkEnabled: {count, plural, one {# source enabled} other {# sources enabled}}
chomageIa.bulkDisabled: {count, plural, one {# source disabled} other {# sources disabled}}
chomageIa.bulkDeleted: {count, plural, one {# source deleted} other {# sources deleted}}
chomageIa.bulkReindexed: {count, plural, one {# source queued for indexing} other {# sources queued for indexing}}
chomageIa.bulkTagsAdded: {count, plural, one {# source updated (tags added)} other {# sources updated (tags added)}}
chomageIa.bulkTagsRemoved: {count, plural, one {# source updated (tags removed)} other {# sources updated (tags removed)}}
chomageIa.sourceSentToAi: This source is sent to the AI.
chomageIa.sourceIgnoredByAi: Ignored by the AI while disabled.
chomageIa.sourceMarkedUpToDate: Source marked as up to date
chomageIa.folderFormDescription: Organise KB sources in a tree structure (3 levels max).
chomageIa.maxDepthHint: Max depth: 3 levels. The API rejects moves that exceed this limit.
chomageIa.createFirstFolder: Create your first folder to organise the KB.
chomageIa.deleteFolderWithSources: {count, plural, one {The # source it contains will be moved to the root (No folder).} other {The # sources it contains will be moved to the root (No folder).}} Subfolders will also be moved to the root.
chomageIa.deleteFolderEmpty: Any subfolders will be moved to the root.
